# [pixi](../../../pixi.md) [workspace](../../workspace.md) [requires-python](../requires-python.md) set

Set the `requires-python` version specifier

--8<-- "docs/reference/cli/pixi/workspace/requires-python/set_extender:description"

## Usage
```
pixi workspace requires-python set <VERSION>
```

## Arguments
- <a id="arg-<VERSION>" href="#arg-<VERSION>">`<VERSION>`</a>
:  The required python version specifier (e.g. ">=3.10")
<br>**required**: `true`

## Description
Set the `requires-python` version specifier.

Example: `pixi workspace requires-python set ">=3.10"`

Note: This command is only supported for `pyproject.toml` manifests.


--8<-- "docs/reference/cli/pixi/workspace/requires-python/set_extender:example"
